notable_phrases: revenue was below our original expectations
weak macro conditions in some emerging markets, was significantly more severe than we originally foresaw
our customers are holding on to their older iPhones a bit longer than in the past
summary: Apple missed revenue expectations due to severe macro headwinds in Greater China and longer iPhone upgrade cycles, though management emphasized services growth and installed base expansion while defending pricing and product decisions.
change_flags: Prepared remarks sentiment decreased by 43.00; Management overall confidence decreased by 12.00; Forward guidance sentiment decreased by 15.00
